channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 31, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 31, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 31, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1746 on March 31 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: National Film and Sound Archive of Australia Adds ‘Succulent Chinese Meal’ Guy
item.description: The archive, which also includes The Babadook and a whole trove of materials related to Mad Max, is now much more complete.

item.title: What is the release date for The Pitt season 2 episode 13 on HBO Max?
item.description: Yet again, Dr. Robby is debating whether to stay or go. But when is The Pitt season 2 episode 13 airing on HBO Max?
